g.text: (b) The same row mid-swipe right - green action zone revealed
(c) After restock - both paths end in the same undo toast
one tap re-86's it again - no retyping
Restocked rows are never deleted - they power autocomplete (FR-004) and one-tap re-86 (FR-010)
Acting on an already-restocked item is a
no-op - live sync prevents stale check-offs.
One tap re-86's a frequent item from
Device B's list updates - no refresh
on it is a no-op - never stale.
A 44px circle check leads every row - the accessible
baseline. Swipe-right is the power path; both restock.
Both paths end in the same toast. A mis-tap at the
store recovers in one tap within the session.
Restocked rows are never deleted. History feeds
autocomplete and one-tap re-86 - faster every capture.
Restocking an already-restocked item is a no-op.
Realtime sync means no stale check-offs, ever.
Both restock paths call the same restock action and surface the same undo toast; undo re-86's through the shared submit path (FR-016).
A restock flips status to stocked - the row leaves every member's list within 2 seconds (FR-002, SC-002) and joins history forever.
